Validated self-hosted modern authenticated app source. The local runtime is online and surveyable, with authenticated feed navigation, multi-contact transaction-step navigation, notification state changes, bank-account navigation, bank-account creation and deletion boundaries, a reset-aware cross-view comment verification task, request-detail navigation, comment submission, cross-view request verification, cross-view payment verification, multiple confirmation-boundary money flows, and a monstrous reset-aware request-create, feed-reopen, comment-mutate, and final detail-reverification workflow already recorded.

Validated ERPNext source using the official frappe_docker demo stack on localhost:8090. The reseed path performs a full volume reset, completes the setup wizard automatically, and seeds deterministic customer, item, supplier, address, and contact fixtures. Recorded tasks now include erpnext-login-open-desk-home-001, erpnext-open-item-list-001, erpnext-open-customer-list-001, erpnext-open-new-customer-form-001, erpnext-new-customer-boundary-001, erpnext-open-new-sales-order-form-001, erpnext-open-seeded-item-detail-001, erpnext-open-customer-list-filter-001, erpnext-new-customer-save-verify-list-001, erpnext-new-customer-save-rename-reverify-detail-001, erpnext-open-supplier-address-contact-tab-001, erpnext-open-item-uom-tab-001, erpnext-open-item-inventory-tab-001, and erpnext-open-item-sales-tab-001.

Validated second deterministic GOV.UK-style service-form fixture with thirteen tasks covering route guidance, summary-edit propagation in both directions, validation recovery for both income and email format, direct result-page completion on multiple work-status branches, a self-employed review route, an employed branch-change result flow, a confirmation boundary, and a monstrous review-loop task that stacks double validation recovery, branch flips, email-row removal and re-addition, and a final confirmation stop.
Pattern-source track for validation recovery, check-answers loops, and local GOV.UK-style service prototypes.

Derived local service-form prototype track with seventeen validated tasks covering single and multi-error validation recovery, branch changes in both directions, summary-email edits, summary-triggered validation on a changed branch, check-answers edit loops, multi-edit state propagation, and multiple confirmation boundaries.

Validated harder local HMRC-style service-form fixture with fifteen recorded hard and very-hard tasks: hmrc-income-decrease-validation-recovery-001, hmrc-contact-method-change-loop-001, hmrc-send-update-boundary-001, hmrc-more-than-one-source-guidance-001, hmrc-change-income-source-from-summary-001, hmrc-stopped-income-validation-recovery-001, hmrc-email-contact-validation-recovery-001, hmrc-change-contact-method-to-post-001, hmrc-text-contact-validation-recovery-001, hmrc-change-notes-from-summary-001, hmrc-change-new-amount-from-summary-001, hmrc-change-source-and-contact-boundary-001, hmrc-double-validation-send-boundary-001, hmrc-more-than-one-source-send-boundary-001, and hmrc-change-income-source-send-boundary-001.
Guidance-source track for local HMRC-style prototype-kit journeys with branching and review flows.
Blocked for now because Playwright survey currently receives a "Just a moment..." anti-bot interstitial instead of the real storefront.
Reference intake package for enterprise HR workflows. Prefer a self-hosted OrangeHRM source for reproducible benchmark tasks.

Validated self-hosted enterprise-workflow track using the official OrangeHRM dev environment with rootless Docker, a deterministic reseed script, and the generic source reseed hook. The runtime now uses repo-managed transient patches for localhost nginx access and seeded installer values so the nested OrangeHRM checkouts do not need to stay dirty between runs. Includes orangehrm-pim-search-admin-employee-001, orangehrm-pim-open-admin-detail-001, orangehrm-add-employee-boundary-001, orangehrm-pim-search-ava-patel-001, orangehrm-pim-open-ava-detail-001, orangehrm-contact-details-open-001, orangehrm-contact-details-boundary-001, orangehrm-contact-details-save-verify-001, orangehrm-apply-leave-boundary-001, orangehrm-pim-search-marcus-lee-001, orangehrm-pim-open-ava-edit-boundary-001, orangehrm-add-employee-login-details-boundary-001, orangehrm-pim-open-marcus-edit-boundary-001, orangehrm-contact-details-save-verify-alt-email-001, orangehrm-pim-save-reopen-contact-boundary-001, and orangehrm-pim-save-reopen-contact-save-reverify-001. The latest additions establish both a monstrous OrangeHRM confirmation-boundary workflow and a true double-save reverify workflow on Ava Patel.

Validated self-hosted pretix source using the official standalone image on localhost:8100 plus a repo-managed reseed script. The reset path recreates the container, logs in as admin@localhost / admin, enables admin mode, creates organizer 'NExUI Benchmark Lab', event 'nexui-event', and a single product baseline. Recorded tasks now cover login, events, event detail, products, seeded product detail, Price and Availability tab navigation, bounded add-product, product-name, original-price, and purchase-limit flows, plus reseed-required create-and-verify, product-name-save-and-verify, original-price-save-and-verify, purchase-limit-save-and-verify, default-price-save-and-verify, event-contact-email-save-and-verify, and a monstrous multi-tab product save-list-reopen verification workflow. Orders and attendees remain deferred because the current local orders surface returns an Internal Server Error.

Seed intake package for login, modal, dynamic content, and file flows. Includes validated tasks internet-dropdown-001, internet-dynamic-loading-001, internet-dynamic-controls-remove-001, internet-key-presses-enter-001, internet-add-remove-elements-001, internet-login-invalid-001, internet-dynamic-controls-enable-type-001, internet-shifting-content-portfolio-001, and internet-entry-ad-close-modal-001.

Validated WebArena Verified GitLab source with a 12-task batch covering seeded UI login, authenticated project navigation, new-issue form opening, missing-title validation, a Create issue confirmation boundary, a cancel flow, reset-aware issue creation with cross-view verification, both boundary and save-and-verify settings tasks, a monstrous create-list-reopen-second-edit boundary workflow, and a monstrous save-and-reverify workflow that proves second-save persistence across the issues list and reopened detail page. Rootless Docker exposes the GitLab UI on port 8023 and env-ctrl on port 8024, and reseed-aware mutating GitLab tasks now pass on the generic source reset path.

Validated WebArena Verified map source on localhost:3030 with recorded tasks for directions mode, layers, share, six seeded Monaco route-result state changes including chained reverse/engine-switch/share workflows, and two geocoder-backed home-search tasks. The source now carries a machine-checked readiness command, a deterministic frontend asset patch during start/reseed, and split routing/geocoder bootstrap modes, so route and search work can be brought up before deeper disambiguation tasks.

Validated sandboxed benchmark-environment track backed by the official WebArena Verified shopping_admin image. Rootless Docker exposes the authenticated Magento admin surface on port 7780 and env-ctrl on port 7781, the documented auto-login header supports deterministic survey and recording, and the generic source reseed hook now supports reset-aware mutating tasks. The active batch includes webarena-admin-open-admin-edit-form-001, webarena-admin-open-add-user-form-001, webarena-admin-open-user-role-grid-001, webarena-admin-add-user-boundary-001, webarena-admin-add-user-missing-email-validation-001, webarena-admin-add-user-invalid-email-validation-001, webarena-admin-add-user-password-mismatch-validation-001, webarena-admin-edit-admin-email-boundary-001, webarena-admin-edit-admin-missing-password-validation-001, webarena-admin-add-user-save-verify-grid-001, webarena-admin-edit-admin-save-verify-grid-001, webarena-admin-add-user-save-open-edit-verify-001, webarena-admin-edit-admin-save-open-edit-verify-001, and the monstrous webarena-admin-add-user-save-grid-open-edit-role-verify-001 plus webarena-admin-add-user-save-reopen-edit-role-boundary-001.
